title: Cobblemon Ultra Plasma
description: This adds a single pokemon: Necrozora. As of now, they're not a form, but their own fakemon, as I am new to scripting. This requires cobblemon in order to function.
body:
This datapack adds a fusion of Necrozma and Zeraora: Necrozora. As of now, it is an ultra rare end spawn as its own fakemon, because I am new to scripting and can't make forms just yet. credits to https://www.deviantart.com/albrt-wlson for the art that inspired this project. This datapack requires Cobblemon in order to function.

Abilities:
Volt Absorb
Prism Armor
H: Ion Field (Sets electric terrain and boosts speed while under it)

Added Moves:
Ion Lance (Non-contact physical electric move with 140 base power. Drastically lowers both of the user's attack stats after each usage.)

How to install:

1. Download the latest release

2. Put into your world's datapack folder and your game's resource pack folder

And that's it, you now are able to catch this pokemon ingame.
